arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool & Richard Hughes will be on red alert after Rayan Cherki bombshell
arts.sum: Rayan Cherki, along with the likes of Borussia Dortmund’s Jamie Gittens, looks set to be one of the most highly sought-after talents in the summer transfer window. The 21-year-old attacking midfielder, who can also operate on either wing, has enjoyed a productive campaign with Lyon so far. The Frenchman has plundered five goals and provided […] The post Exclusive: Liverpool & Richard Hughes will be on red alert after Rayan Cherki bombshell appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Slot warns Liverpool can't take Ipswich lightly
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot said Ipswich Town have been "unlucky" in games since their promotion to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arne dad still not fully invested in Slot machine despite Liverpool dominance
arts.sum: The Dutchman regularly calls his father Arend after matches only to hear he is often left unimpressed.

arts.ttl: 'That could be a risk' - Arne Slot addresses left-back situation as Liverpool options considered
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has been speaking ahead of the Premier League visit of Ipswich Town on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah sends new wordless message Arne Slot will love amid contract hint
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news with Mohamed Salah posting a message on social media before the Premier League clash against Ipswich Town

arts.ttl: Robbie Fowler eyes Bolton job as Liverpool icon searches for return after Saudi sacking
arts.sum: Robbie Fowler has submitted his name for consideration for the vacant Bolton job, with his last spell in management coming with an eight-game stint at Al-Qadish in 2023

arts.ttl: Arne Slot clarifies Ibrahima Konate stance after Liverpool star's worrying claim
arts.sum: Arne Slot recently welcomed back Ibrahima Konate from a period out injured and the Liverpool boss is keen not to put too much on the defender amid fears his problem could return

arts.ttl: Liverpool legend responds to Saudi transfer rumours amid shock Duran interest
arts.sum: Mo Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold aren’t the only Liverpool legends to be linked with January transfers, with a fourth Anfield hero speaking out about rumours that he could change clubs in January. Sadio Mane might have left Anfield in 2023 to sign for Bayern Munich before hooking up with Cristiano Ronaldo’s Al-Nassr a year later, but the 32-year-old Senegal international retains special significance on Merseyside, where he will go down as one of the Reds’ all-time greats.

arts.ttl: 'I was in Liverpool dressing room after Steven Gerrard slip - the way he acted spoke volumes'
arts.sum: Liverpool icon Steven Gerrard's slip against Chelsea in 2014 will go down as one of the Premier League's most infamous and defining mishaps - and this former Red had a front-row seat

arts.ttl: 'Not a good sign' - Arne Slot explains new Liverpool injury blow and Ibrahima Konate fitness
arts.sum: The latest on Curtis Jones and Ibrahima Konate's fitness issues as Arne Slot previews Liverpool's game with Ipswich on Saturday
